titleStmt.title: SII 9.69: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 69. (A.R. No. 306 of 1905.) ON A SLAB LYING SOUTH OF THE SIVA TEMPLE, NEAR THE DURGA TEMPLE ON THE BANKS OF THE PENNAR RIVER, AT PUSHPAGIRI, CUDDAPPAH TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is not dated; it belongs to the reign of the Rāshṭrakūṭa king Kṛishṇa-Kannihadeva (i.e., Kṛishṇa III?). It registers the gift of 12 mattars of land made to the temple of Nāgēśvara and to all the temples, including that of Sarppēśvara, in Pushpagiri by the king, when he was returning from his Jōti pilgrimage. It is not dated but the characters belong to the 11th century A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśra
ya śrīprīthvīvallabha mahārājāThellabha are written above the line.
dhirāja paramēśvara parama
bhaṭṭāraka raṭṭakuḷacakravartti
śrīmatu kriṣṇakannihadēva
ru jōti jātremāḍi maguḷa ba
ndu śrīparvvatadakṣiṇadvāra śrīpuṟpa
giriya nāgēsvaradēvarge sarppēsvaradē
varoḷagāgi samastedēvarge salva nivēdya
dhūpa dīpa bhōgakaṁ banda Abhyāgatargge jakka
reya puṟpagiriya naḍuve Uttaradakṣi
ṇa nīḷagāgi piriyakōlalu hanneraḍu ma
ttaru keyyumaṁ dēvara mūḍaṇa nandanava
namumaṁ dhārāpūrvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru

Intī dharmavanārā
honnamāḍi muḷuki
nāḍanāḷdu mahārājyaṁ
geyvaru Ī dharmavanu kaṁ
ḍisade naḍesidaḍe tamma
māḍida dharmapala Idaṁ kiḍi
sade naḍesidaḍe . svadattaṁ parada
ttaṁvā jō haranti vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭi
rvvariṣaśrahaśrāṇi miṣṭāyāṁ
prajāyatē krimiḥ . Ī dharmava
kiḍisi tapuvaru gaṁgeya taḍiya
llu kaṭṭida sāyira kavileyu
maṁ brāhmaṇarumaṁ koṁda pāpa
dalu hōharuThe following lines are engraved below the inscription:—
svasti śrīmatu śrīśaila pra
ri nāgēsvaradēvara puṣpagiripa
vāma pūrva viṣṇudēvara-
mattara hirikōla da ||
Digital edition of SII 9.69 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
